question_sentence: “Sinners” leads the 2026 Oscar nominations with a record-breaking 16 nods. What was the first horror film to win the Academy Award for best picture?
evidence: Released in 1991, “The Silence of the Lambs” swept the 1992 Oscars, winning best picture, director, actor, actress and adapted screenplay.

question_sentence: The 98th Academy Awards will take place in Los Angeles, celebrating top performances and achievements in film. Which award category is new this year?
evidence: Best casting is a new category at the 2026 Academy Awards. The Golden Globes unveiled the category of outstanding podcast earlier this year.

question_sentence: Who is hosting this year’s Oscars ceremony?
evidence: Conan O’Brien will return as host of the 98th Academy Awards after hosting the ceremony in 2025.

question_sentence: Which actress has won the most Oscars?
evidence: Katharine Hepburn holds the record with four best actress Oscars. Meryl Streep, however, is the most nominated performer in the acting categories, with 21 nominations between 1979 and 2018 — including a record 17 best actress nominations.

question_sentence: If they win this year, which of the following acting nominees would join the elite club of three-time Oscar winners that includes Bergman, Streep and McDormand?
evidence: Emma Stone has won two previous Oscars, for “La La Land” and “Poor Things.” Sean Penn has previously won for “Mystic River” and “Milk.”

question_sentence: How long must a feature-length film be to qualify for the best picture Oscar, acting Oscars and many other categories?
evidence: To be eligible for best picture, a feature film must exceed 40 minutes in length.

question_sentence: Kate Hudson is nominated for an Oscar this year for “Song Sung Blue,” 25 years after her first nomination for “Almost Famous.” Which other female nominee this year went an even longer stretch between nominations?
evidence: Amy Madigan was first nominated for an Oscar in 1986 for “Twice in a Lifetime.” Now, 40 years later, she’s nominated again for best supporting actress for her role in the horror film “Weapons.”

question_sentence: Which film won the very first Academy Award for best picture in 1929?
evidence: "Wings," a silent war drama directed by William A. Wellman, received the very first Academy Award for best picture on May 16, 1929.

question_sentence: Which popular song from the animated film “KPop Demon Hunters” is nominated for an Oscar this year?
evidence: The viral hit “Golden” is nominated for best original song.

question_sentence: American actress Tatum O’Neal is the youngest person to win a competitive Oscar. How old was she when she won?
evidence: Tatum O’Neal is the youngest person to ever win a competitive Oscar at 10 years, 148 days old. She won the Oscar for best supporting actress in 1974 for her role in “Paper Moon.”
